overall.description: First-person exploration of a tropical fishing village at dusk in a video game (Far Cry 6). The player walks through a rustic dock area with fish markets, passes a female NPC, examines a large hanging shark, and views the surrounding waters and stilt houses against a sunset horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: fishing dock processing area with fish piles

agents.ego_description: walking slowly through the dock area, observing the fish market surroundings

notable_agents.action: woman in pink tank top standing near fish piles, gesturing with her hands

entered.detail: female character in pink tank top and jeans standing near fish piles
large pile of fish on the ground with red blood stains underneath
wooden wall of stilt house with weathered planks
stack of red plastic crates with fish designs
rustic wooden table with fish processing equipment
yellow warning sign with shark symbol and Spanish text

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a rustic fishing dock at dusk. A female NPC stands near piles of fresh fish and blood stains on the concrete. Wooden stilt houses and market tables line the dock area as the camera moves slowly forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered fish market stall with processing tables

events.description: moves from open dock area into covered market stall with wooden roof

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered market area, examining fish crates and equipment

entered.detail: wooden beam roof structure providing cover over the market area
green plastic crate filled with fish on wooden table
white metal bucket on the ground near tables
red cooler box emitting bright light from within
rusted corrugated metal sheet wall of the building

segments.scene_description: The camera moves into a covered market stall with a wooden roof structure. Green crates of fish, metal buckets, and a glowing red cooler are visible on processing tables. The area is sheltered and artificially lit, with corrugated metal walls on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: open dock with hanging shark display and ocean view

events.description: exits covered market into open dock area with view of hanging shark
camera tilts upward to examine the large hanging shark from below

agents.ego_description: approaching the hanging shark and looking up at it, then circling around to view it from different angles

entered.detail: large shark carcass suspended from wooden frame with visible wounds
wooden A-frame structure used to hang the shark
small tropical island with palm trees visible across the water
weathered wooden posts extending into the water
moon visible in the dark blue dusk sky with scattered clouds

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered market, the scene opens to a wide dock area with a massive shark hanging from a wooden gallows frame. The camera approaches the shark, tilts upward to examine it against the dusk sky, and reveals tropical islands and wooden dock posts in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with stilt houses and sunset view

events.description: camera pans left to view the village stilt houses along the shoreline

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront, observing the sunset horizon and stilt houses, then turning back toward the village

entered.detail: wooden stilt houses built over the water with solar panels on roof
orange and yellow sunset glow on the horizon over calm water
dense tropical forest and hills behind the village

segments.scene_description: Moving past the hanging shark, the camera reveals a panoramic waterfront view with the sunset on the horizon and tropical islands in the distance. The camera then pans left to show wooden stilt houses built over the water, with forested mountains rising behind the village.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rustic fishing village that transitions from the cramped interior of a market to an expansive sunset waterfront. It begins on a concrete dock at dusk, passing a female NPC and piles of fresh fish beside wooden stilt houses. As the camera moves forward, the scene shifts into a sheltered market stall filled with green crates, metal buckets, and a glowing red cooler under a wooden roof. The view then opens back up to the wide dock area, where the camera tilts upward to examine a massive shark hanging from a wooden gallows frame against the darkening sky. Finally, the camera moves past the shark to reveal a panoramic horizon of tropical islands and forested mountains, panning left to showcase the village's stilt houses built over the water.
